heading: Email animation
description: A bold, minimal design paired with motion to introduce services and make efficient use of a compact digital space.
text: This project uses a bold, minimal design approach to create a confident and focused visual presence. Animation is used to introduce the agency's services, helping guide users while making effective use of a compact layout. The playful heading subtly references a classic Monroe line, adding a layer of character to the piece.
Animation was created in After Effects as part of the overall design and presentation.
